top_findings.summary: The skill has unrestricted Bash command execution (Bash(cmd:*)), which allows it to run any command on the system. While generating and testing Dockerfiles may require some shell access (e.g., for building images or running security scans), granting blanket permission to execute any Bash command is excessive and not minimized to the necessary actions. This could enable actions unrelated to Dockerfile generation, such as accessing sensitive system files, modifying unrelated data, or performing unauthorized operations, posing a security risk if the skill is compromised or misused.
